code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur_val = 0
mut cur_sign = 1
mut has = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if has
      nums = list.push(nums, cur_val * cur_sign)
      cur_val = 0
      cur_sign = 1
      has = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    cur_sign = -1
    has = true
  else if b == 43
    has = true
  else
    cur_val = cur_val * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has
  nums = list.push(nums, cur_val * cur_sign)
end

mut out = ""
mut idx = 0
let total = nums.len()
while idx < total
  if idx % 2 == 0
    let v = match nums.get(idx)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if string.is_empty(out)
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
println(out)
